radii_grid_logic: rmin=max(0.5*rhalf,1.0,SOFT_KPC); rmax=min(5*rhalf,200); if rmax<=rmin: rmax=min(max(rmin*2,rmin+1),200); logspace(log10(rmin),log10(rmax),N_RADII)
selection_criteria: SubhaloFlag=1, Mstar>=1e8 Msun, n_star>=100, n_dm>=100, rhalf_star>0 => 48133
note: 29122 is not achievable from any simple TNG100-1 selection; actual quality-cut base is 48133
